name: @wazum/typo3-live-reload-vite
description: Vite plugin broadcasting TYPO3 content and template file changes to connected dev clients.
author: Wolfgang Klinger <wolfgang@wazum.com>

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.client.json && esbuild src/vite-client.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/vite-client.js && esbuild src/poll-client.ts --bundle --format=iife --minify --outfile=../../Public/JavaScript/poll-client.js
